https://openminds.om-i.org/props/baseDis._instruction: Enter the perpendicular distance between the centered major and minor base planes of this frustum.
https://openminds.om-i.org/props/baseDis.label: Base distance
https://openminds.om-i.org/props/baseDis.name: baseDistance

https://openminds.om-i.org/props/majorBa._instruction: Enter the major two-dimensional base shape of this frustum.
https://openminds.om-i.org/props/majorBa.label: Major base shape
https://openminds.om-i.org/props/majorBa.name: majorBaseShape

https://openminds.om-i.org/props/minorBa._instruction: Enter the ratio of the smaller to the larger base size of this frustum.
https://openminds.om-i.org/props/minorBa.label: Minor base scale
https://openminds.om-i.org/props/minorBa.name: minorBaseScale
